name: formulario-admissao-rh
description: Formulario web para admissoes com geracao de planilha XLSX a partir do template original.

scripts.test:e2e:prod: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const command = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx'; const env = { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL: 'https://formulario-admissao-semep.onrender.com', PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER: 'true' }; const result = spawnSync(command, ['playwright', 'test'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:e2e:full:prod: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const command = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx'; const env = { ...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL: 'https://formulario-admissao-semep.onrender.com', PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER: 'true' }; const result = spawnSync(command, ['playwright', 'test'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
